studyName: Smoking and Tumor Immune Microenvironment in HNSCC

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table informs of subject's gender, ethnicity and race, age at diagnosis, smoking status, amount smoked, body site where primary tumor was found, type of treatment received, disease recurrence status, time from primary diagnosis to recurrence, vital status, and time from primary diagnosis to death or last known alive date.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Patient sequence number

variables.name: age
variables.description: Age at diagnosis of index tumor.

variables.name: ethnicity
variables.description: Identifies patients of Hispanic origin.

variables.name: gender
variables.description: Sex of the patient.

variables.name: m
variables.description: Distant metastasis status according to AJCC 7th Edition.

variables.name: mif
variables.description: Was muliplex immunohistochemistry performed on tumor slide?

variables.name: n
variables.description: Nodal status according to AJCC 7th Edition.

variables.name: pack_yr
variables.description: Number of cigarette packs smoked per day muliplied by number of years smoked.

variables.name: race
variables.description: Identifies the race of the patient.

variables.name: recurrence
variables.description: Did the patient experience a recurrence of disease.

variables.name: recurrence_time
variables.description: Time from primary diagnosis to recurrence.

variables.name: site
variables.description: Location of primary tumor.

variables.name: smoking
variables.description: Patient smoking history.

variables.name: stage
variables.description: Pathological stage of tumor at diagnosis according to AJCC 7th Edition.

variables.name: survival
variables.description: Patient vital status.

variables.name: survival_time
variables.description: Time from primary diagnosis to death or last known date alive.

variables.name: t
variables.description: Tumor size according to AJCC 7th Edition.

variables.name: treatment
variables.description: Type of treatment the patient received.

variables.name: tumor_status
variables.description: Is the tumor primary, secondary, or a recurrence.

tables.description: This sample attributes data table informs of whether the sample is a primary, secondary, or recurring tumor, tumor size, tumor nodal status, tumor metastatic status, pathological stage of tumor, and whether the sample originated from a tumor.

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Does the sample originate from a tumor?

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample identifier.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample usage.

tables.description: This subject consent data table informs of subject ID and consent group in which the subject belongs.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
